overview.short: Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra, or popularly known as Garodi, is a temple in Mangalore dedicated to the twin cultural heroes of Tulu Nadu region, Koti and Chennayya (circa
overview.description: Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra, or popularly known as Garodi, is a temple in Mangalore dedicated to the twin cultural heroes of Tulu Nadu region, Koti and Chennayya (circa 1556 A.D to 1591 A.D.). The temple is located at Kankanadi, adjacent to the Mangalore-Bangalore highway just 4 km away from the heart of Mangalore. This temple is of much significance to the Tuluva community.

topPlaces.name: Dakshina Kannada
topPlaces.description: Dakshina Kannada district is located in the state of Karnataka in India, with its headquarters in the coastal city of Mangaluru. The district covers an area nestled between the Western Ghats and the Arabian Sea.

topPlaces.name: Aloyseum
topPlaces.description: Aloyseum is a museum on the St Aloysius College campus in Mangaluru city of Karnataka in India. It was established in the year 1913.

topPlaces.name: St. Joseph's Monastery, Bikarnakatte
topPlaces.description: St. Joseph's Monastery in Mangalore is a house of monastic observance, founded by Belgian Carmelites in 1947 in the area of Carmel Hill, though the Carmelite order had been serving the region since the late 17th Century.

topPlaces.name: Bajal
topPlaces.description: Bajal is a census town in Mangalore city, Dakshina Kannada district in the state of Karnataka, India. It is 2.7 kms from Praja soudha (New DC Office Padil).

topPlaces.name: Mangaluru taluk
topPlaces.description: Mangaluru taluk is a taluk (subdistrict) in the Dakshina Kannada district, Karnataka on the western coast of India. Mangaluru is the administrative headquarters of the taluk.

topPlaces.name: Kadri, Mangaluru
topPlaces.description: Kadri is a city in Karnataka, India. As of 2020 the Bhandary Vertica, a 56-storey building that would be one of the tallest buildings in South India, was under construction there.

topPlaces.name: Kadri Manjunath Temple
topPlaces.description: Kadri Manjunatha Temple is a historic temple in Mangaluru in the state of Karnataka, India. The incharge and priests in the temple are Shivalli Madhva Brahmins.

topPlaces.name: Bajpe
topPlaces.description: Bajpe is a locality in Mangalore city of Dakshina Kannada district in the state of Karnataka, now also known as Bajpe Town, India. It is around 18 km (11 mi) from the city of Mangalore.

items.note: Dakshina Kannada district is located in the state of Karnataka in India, with its headquarters in the coastal city of Mangaluru. The district covers an area nestled between the Western Ghats and the Arabian Sea.

St. Joseph's Monastery in Mangalore is a house of monastic observance, founded by Belgian Carmelites in 1947 in the area of Carmel Hill, though the Carmelite order had been serving the region since the late 17th Century.

Mangaluru taluk is a taluk (subdistrict) in the Dakshina Kannada district, Karnataka on the western coast of India. Mangaluru is the administrative headquarters of the taluk.
Kadri is a city in Karnataka, India. As of 2020 the Bhandary Vertica, a 56-storey building that would be one of the tallest buildings in South India, was under construction there.
Kadri Manjunatha Temple is a historic temple in Mangaluru in the state of Karnataka, India. The incharge and priests in the temple are Shivalli Madhva Brahmins.
Bajpe is a locality in Mangalore city of Dakshina Kannada district in the state of Karnataka, now also known as Bajpe Town, India. It is around 18 km (11 mi) from the city of Mangalore.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (10 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (3 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra?
faq.a: Stays in Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shree Brahma Baidarkala Garadi Kshetra?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dakshina Kannada, Aloyseum, St. Joseph's Monastery, Bikarnakatte, Bajal, Mangaluru taluk.
